title: Implement hash-based TDMA slot assignment fnv1a32(EUI64 ^ epoch) % num_slots
description: Add lichen_hash_32 or fnv1a32 helper if missing, implement slot computation per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:76 and test/vectors/ccp_tdma.json in lichen_tdma_init() or a new lichen_tdma_compute_slot() function. Integrate EUI64 and epoch parameters.
